title: SR 12-3: Supervisory Letter SR 12-3 on         Interagency Guidance on Allowance Estimation Practices for Junior Lien Loans and Lines of Credit  -- January 31, 2012
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 12-3 on         Interagency Guidance on Allowance Estimation Practices for Junior Lien Loans and Lines of Credit  -- January 31, 2012
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-3
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all banking organizations with junior lien loans, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO EACH DOMESTIC BANKING ORGANIZATION SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
bm25_text: SR 12-3 Supervisory Letter SR 12-3 on         Interagency Guidance on Allowance Estimation Practices for Junior Lien Loans and Lines of Credit  -- January 31, 2012 to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all banking organizations with junior lien loans, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO EACH DOMESTIC BANKING ORGANIZATION SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE SUBJECT: 1.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/contactus/feedback.aspx. Return to text
